case_title: CAROL ANN BRUNSON VS. PAGE STREET GUEST HOUSE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUNSON, CAROL ANN AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE STREET GUEST HOUSE BACA, GERALD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-06-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-04-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-22-2003

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CAROL ANN BRUNSON FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-13-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-28-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-06-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST CAROL ANN BRUNSON FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-16-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-01-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ANN SOLIMAN, CSR #6812. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-17-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: BRUNSON, CAROL ANN 15 BISHOP STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules; therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2003 Continued To Sep-17-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/17/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Ann Soliman, CSR #6812. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-16-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in pro per is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by Margaret Del Coto, CSR #8493. (212)
